name: Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup whole wheat or white flour
2 tablespoons sugar or equivalent of other sweetener
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the wet ingredients (soymilk and vinegar) in one bowl.
2. Mix the dry ingredients (cornmeal, flour, sugar, salt, baking powder, and baking soda) in another bowl.
3. Combine the wet and dry mixtures until just blended.
4. Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
6. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
